title: 🏛 Sentient Paradox Architecture
name: Sentient Paradox Architecture
what_it_is: Buildings or spaces that *think* in contradiction—temples alive with logical paradox, shifting structure based on observer belief.
how_to_use: the temple thinks—but not in lines—its geometry answers by folding back
each visitor sees new rooms—belief alters the paradox’s response
animation_behavior: Architecture shifts based on thought input, rooms echo with contradictions, paths rewrite behind you ---
